title: NERC CIP CIP-007-6 R5 — TACACS+ Privileged Access Logging on BES Cyber Systems

compliance.assurance_rationale: NERC CIP-007-6 R5 — system access controls. UC-17.1.43 produces continuous TACACS+ command authorization evidence on BES Cyber System network devices.
compliance.controlObjective: Demonstrate that privileged commands on BES Cyber System network devices are logged via TACACS+ command authorization, providing the audit trail required by CIP-007-6 R5.
compliance.evidenceArtifact: Saved search 'UC-22.13.71' archiving high-risk TACACS+ command events on BES NADs to `audit_evidence` with `cip_clause=CIP-007-6 R5`.

dataSources: `index=nac sourcetype=cisco:ise:syslog` *Tacacs* + `bes_cyber_asset_inventory.csv` for BES classification. Cross-reference UC-17.1.43.
app: Splunk Enterprise Security (263) + Splunk Add-on for Cisco Identity Services (1915).
spl:
index=nac sourcetype="cisco:ise:syslog" MessageCode IN (11042, 11043) earliest=-1d
| lookup bes_cyber_asset_inventory.csv device_ip OUTPUT bes_classification
| where bes_classification IN ("Medium-Impact", "High-Impact")
| where match(command, "(?i)(write erase|no aaa|no logging|enable secret|config replace)")
| eval cip_clause="CIP-007-6 R5", control="BES_Privileged_Command_Audit"
| table _time, user, device_ip, command, bes_classification, cip_clause
| collect index=audit_evidence
description: We continuously evidence NERC CIP-007-6 R5 — privileged commands on BES Cyber System network devices are TACACS-logged with attribution.
value: NERC CIP audits will probe BES Cyber System access. This UC produces continuous, BES-scoped, machine-attested evidence — the regulator-quality artefact.
implementation: Schedule the saved search daily at 06:00 local time; archive results to the `audit_evidence` summary index for SOC 2 2017 TSC evidence.
visualization: CIP-007-6 panel: BES privileged command timeline.

references.title: UC-17.1.43 — Cisco ISE TACACS+ Privileged Command Audit

knownFalsePositives: 1. Approved planned outages — annotate with NERC outage ticket.
detailedImplementation:
## Prerequisites

- UC-17.1.43 operational.
- `bes_cyber_asset_inventory.csv` maintained per CIP-002 attestation.
- `audit_evidence` with NERC CIP retention.

## Step 1-5

```ini
[UC-22.13.71: NERC CIP CIP-007-6 R5 — Privileged Command Evidence]
cron_schedule = 0 6 * * *
actions = summary_index
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.13.71,reg=NERC_CIP,clause=CIP-007-6 R5
```

Quarterly review with NERC CIP compliance lead; annual audit submission for triennial NERC CIP audit.
grandmaExplanation: We continuously evidence NERC CIP-007-6 R5 — privileged commands on BES Cyber System network devices are TACACS-logged with attribution. That is important for the audit, where proof needs to line up with what the rules expect.

controlTest.positiveScenario: Privileged command on BES device. Evidence captured.
controlTest.negativeScenario: No privileged commands on BES devices. Empty result; control attested.

evidence: Saved search archived to `audit_evidence` with NERC CIP-007-6 R5 tagging.
exclusions: Low-Impact and non-BES network devices excluded via `bes_cyber_asset_inventory.csv`.
